problem_owner_org.name: Counter Culture Coffee
problem_owner_org.description: US specialty coffee roaster with retail, ecommerce, and education operations.

problem.title: Siloed business tools prevent data-driven operations
problem.description: Counter Culture needed better visibility across customers, distributors, suppliers, and internal processes. The public Zoho case study says the company had been relying on Salesforce plus a patchwork of software, email, and spreadsheets, and wanted a unified and data-driven system that would support more proactive operations.

requirements.body: Centralizes customer, distributor, and supplier data with real-time visibility across the team.

citations.source_title: Counter Culture Coffee grows across the country with Zoho One
citations.evidence_note: Supports employee count, multi-city expansion, the fragmented-tool problem, and the need for a unified, data-driven operating system.

requirements.body: Replaces fragmented tools, email threads, and spreadsheets with a unified system.

pilot_framework.scope: Pilot the unified workflow across customer records, distributor and supplier visibility, support workflows, and core reporting for one operating segment.
pilot_framework.suggested_kpis: Track time spent on manual coordination, completeness of shared customer and partner records, reporting latency, and employee time freed for higher-value work.
pilot_framework.success_criteria: The pilot succeeds if staff can work from shared records instead of disconnected tools, visibility improves across commercial relationships, and routine coordination effort declines.
pilot_framework.common_pitfalls: Common pitfalls include partial data migration, leaving supplier or distributor processes outside the workflow, and failing to standardize cross-functional data ownership.
pilot_framework.duration: A 6- to 8-week pilot is appropriate for one business segment covering shared records and reporting workflows.
pilot_framework.resource_commitment: Requires an operations or commercial lead, a small cross-functional user group, and admin support for migration, reporting, and workflow standardization.
